title: Copie conforme
writer: Jacques Companéez, Henri Jeanson, Christiane Imbert
actors: Louis Jouvet, Suzy Delair, Annette Poivre
plot: A smooth criminal, who turns to be Manuel Ismora, and his gang successfully and peacefully pull off con after heist. Elsewhere a timid office worker, Gabriel Dupon, is pressured by his boss into making a sale. A chain of events ca...
